data.title: XRP whales are selling $50M daily, putting $2.20 price at risk for a 22% drop due to increased supply and weakened tech structure.
data.description: The price of XRP faced a potential 22% decrease to $2.20 due to significant selling pressure from large investors, heightened supply on trading platforms, and a weakening technical framework.

data.title: Nancy Padberg, CEO, released book on building healthy culture. Demonstrates how to build thriving teams.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in Phoenix, Nancy Padberg, MBA, the President and CEO of Catholic Education Arizona, launched her first book titled "How a CEO Built a Healthy Culture with Trust, Respect, and Avocados." This book serves as a guide for leaders on fostering a flourishing environment within their organizations. Padberg's insights offer valuable lessons on nurturing workplace culture with key elements like trust and respect.

data.title: HavocAI receives $85M in new capital for expanding maritime autonomous systems. Investors include B Capital, In-Q-Tel, Lockheed Martin.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in Providence, Rhode Island, HavocAI disclosed that it has raised $85 million in fresh funding. The investment originates from various new backers including B Capital, In-Q-Tel, Lockheed Martin, Hanwha, Taiwania, Vanderbilt University, and Up... HavocAI is a prominent creator of maritime autonomous technologies.

data.title: Rare 22-acre Oak Valley Estate near Nashville, Tennessee up for auction by J. P. King Auction Company, highlighting trend of luxury real estate auctions.
data.description: A luxury real estate auction is taking place in Lebanon, Tennessee on October 10, 2025. The J. P. King Auction Company is showcasing the Oak Valley Estate, a unique property spanning approximately 22 acres located near Nashville. This event reflects the increasing trend of luxury real estate auctions across the nation, providing a high level of transparency and fostering competitive bidding.

data.title: Cook County Treasurer Pappas presents Romanian artist Carmen Marin's exhibit "Trapped in the Shadows" in Chicago at 2 pm on October 14th.
data.description: On October 14, 2025, Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas is set to showcase "Trapped in the Shadows," a captivating art exhibit by Romanian artist Carmen Marin, at 2:00 p.m. in the Treasurer's Office in Chicago. This unveiling aims to bring attention to the unique perspective presented in the artwork, with the event open to the public.

data.title: BIT Mining Limited changes name to SOLAI Limited and ticker symbol to SLAI. (NY: BTCM -> SLAI)
data.description: In Akron, Ohio on October 10, 2025, a prominent technology-focused cryptocurrency infrastructure company, BIT Mining Limited (NYSE: BTCM), disclosed a significant update. The company officially changed its name to "SOLAI Limited" and altered its ticker symbol to "SLAI." This development marks a notable transition for the company, previously known as BIT Mining.

data.title: JinkoSolar, one of the top solar module manufacturers, to report Q2 & Q3 2025 results on Nov 17, 2025.
data.description: In Shangrao, China, on October 10, 2025, PRNewswire reported that JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. ("JinkoSolar" or "the Company") (NYSE: JKS), a leading global solar module manufacturer, revealed its intention to unveil the unaudited financial results for the second quarter. JinkoSolar is known for its innovation and large-scale operations in the solar industry.

data.title: Highstreet Insurance Partners wins 2025 Pinnacle Award for innovation, customer protection. Fast-growing US broker recognized.
data.description: Highstreet Insurance Partners ("Highstreet"), a rapidly expanding insurance brokerage in the US, has been recognized for its dedication to innovation, customer protection, and community resilience. Based in Traverse City, Michigan, the company received top industry accolades on October 10, 2025. With a focus on growth, Highstreet is committed to advancing customer service and strengthening communities.
